setting: 深夜、静かな部屋で過ごす最高のひととき
lyrics:
Hello
I've waited here for you
Everlong

Tonight
I throw myself into
And out of the red
Out of her head she sang

Come down
And waste away with me
Down with me
Slow how you wanted it to be
I'm over my head
Out of her head she sang

And I wonder
When I sing along with you
If everything could ever feel this real forever
If anything could ever be this good again
The only thing I'll ever ask of you
You've got to promise not to stop when I say when
She sang

Breathe out
So I can breathe you in
Hold you in
And now
I know you've always been
Out of your head
Out of my head I sang

And I wonder
When I sing along with you
If everything could ever feel this real forever
If anything could ever be this good again
The only thing I'll ever ask of you
You've got to promise not to stop when I say when

She sang
And I wonder...

lyricsJa.en:
Hello
I've waited here for you
Everlong
lyricsJa.ja:
ハロー、ここで君を待っていたんだ
永遠に続くかと思えるほど、ずっと

lyricsJa.en:
Tonight
I throw myself into
And out of the red
Out of her head she sang
lyricsJa.ja:
今夜、僕は身を投じる
突如として、理性を失ったかのように彼女は歌った

lyricsJa.en:
Come down
And waste away with me
Down with me
Slow how you wanted it to be
I'm over my head
Out of her head she sang
lyricsJa.ja:
ここへおいで、僕と一緒に堕ちていこう
僕のところへ
君が望んだように、ゆっくりと
僕はもう手に負えない、夢中になったまま彼女は歌った

lyricsJa.en:
And I wonder
When I sing along with you
If everything could ever feel this real forever
If anything could ever be this good again
The only thing I'll ever ask of you
You've got to promise not to stop when I say when
She sang
lyricsJa.ja:
そして僕は思うんだ
君と一緒に歌う時
すべてがいつまでも、これほど本物に感じられるだろうか
こんなに素晴らしい瞬間が、また訪れるだろうか
君にお願いしたいことはただ一つ
僕が「ここだ」と言ったとき、止めないと約束してくれ
彼女はそう歌った

lyricsJa.en:
Breathe out
So I can breathe you in
Hold you in
And now
I know you've always been
Out of your head
Out of my head I sang
lyricsJa.ja:
息を吐いて　君の息を僕が吸い込めるように
君を僕の中に留めておくように
そして今、分かったんだ
君もずっと同じだったって
君も夢中だった、僕も理性を失いながら歌った

lyricsJa.en:
And I wonder
When I sing along with you
If everything could ever feel this real forever
If anything could ever be this good again
The only thing I'll ever ask of you
You've got to promise not to stop when I say when

She sang
And I wonder...
lyricsJa.ja:
そして僕は思うんだ
君と一緒に歌う時
すべてがいつまでも、これほど本物に感じられるだろうか
こんなに素晴らしい瞬間が、また訪れるだろうか
君にお願いしたいことはただ一つ
僕が「ここだ」と言ったとき、止めないと約束してくれ

彼女はそう歌った
そして僕は思うんだ…

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Hey, I'm glad you came over.
sentences.displayHtml: Hey, I'm glad you came over.

sentences.text: I've waited here for you all day.
sentences.displayHtml: I've waited here for you all day.

conversation.japanese: ねえ、来てくれて嬉しいよ。今日はずっと君を待ってたんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Now I can finally breathe out.
sentences.displayHtml: Now I can finally breathe out.

conversation.japanese: 私も来れて嬉しい。今週はずっと働いてクタクタだった。これでやっと一息つけるわ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Come sit here and waste away with me.
sentences.displayHtml: Come sit here and waste away with me.

conversation.japanese: 今夜は全部忘れよう。ここにおいで、一緒に時を溶かそう。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Do you think we could ever feel this real forever?
sentences.displayHtml: Do you think we could ever feel this real forever?

conversation.japanese: 最高ね。今はとても穏やか。この幸せが永遠に続くなんてこと、あると思う？

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: But honestly, I sometimes wonder if anything could ever be this good again.
sentences.displayHtml: But honestly, I sometimes wonder if anything could ever be this good again.

conversation.japanese: そう願うよ。でも正直、こんなに素晴らしい瞬間がまた訪れるだろうかって思う時があるよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: The only thing I'll ever ask of you is to enjoy this exact moment.
sentences.displayHtml: The only thing I'll ever ask of you is to enjoy this exact moment.

conversation.japanese: 考えすぎよ。私があなたにお願いしたいのは、ただ今この瞬間を楽しむことだけ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I promise I won't stop holding you until you say when.
sentences.displayHtml: I promise I won't stop holding you until you say when.

conversation.japanese: 君の言う通りだ。君が「もういい」ってストップをかけるまで、抱きしめるのをやめないと約束するよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Then hold me, and let's just stay like this.
sentences.displayHtml: Then hold me, and let's just stay like this.

conversation.japanese: じゃあ抱きしめて。このままずっと一緒にいましょう。
